CREATE TABLE test_strings (input String, normalized String);
SELECT length(input), normalizeUTF8NFC(input) AS nfc, length(nfc) AS nfc_len FROM test_strings;
SELECT input, length(normalizeUTF8NFC(input)) FROM test_strings WHERE length(input) > 5;
SELECT input, IF(normalizeUTF8NFC(input) = input, 'No Change', 'Changed') AS normalization_check FROM test_strings;
WITH (SELECT input FROM test_strings WHERE input LIKE 'c%') AS filtered_inputs SELECT input, normalizeUTF8NFC(input) AS nfc FROM filtered_inputs;
SELECT a.data, normalizeUTF8NFC(a.data) AS nfc_data, b.normalized FROM additional_strings a LEFT JOIN test_strings b ON a.data = b.input;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_strings WHERE normalized IS NULL;
ALTER TABLE test_strings ADD COLUMN length_original Int32;
SELECT input, length_original, normalized, length(normalized) FROM test_strings ORDER BY length_original DESC;
